title: Full-Stack Engineer
jd_text:
OTE £92k
Mark43 is approved to hire in Canada, the UK, and 36 U.S. states, including Alabama, Arizona, California (excluding San Francisco), Colorado, Connecticut, Washington D.C., Florida, Georgia, Iowa, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Massachusetts, Maryland, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, North Carolina, Nebraska, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Ohio, Oklahoma, Oregon, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Vermont, Washington, Wisconsin, and West Virginia. Before applying to a remote role, please ensure that you are able to perform the position in one of the states listed above. State locations and specifics are subject to change as our hiring requirements shift.Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in the country in which the role is being hired. We are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.Mark43's mission is to empower communities and their governments with technologies that improve the safety and quality of life for all. We build modern, resilient software that first responders and public safety professionals depend on in their most critical moments. From dispatching emergency services to filing reports that shape public policy, our work directly impacts how governments serve their communities—especially those who need it most.We are looking for a Software Engineer who is excited to solve real-world problems with tangible societal impact. You'll help build core systems used by public safety agencies around the world, and explore how emerging tools like AI-assisted development can make our engineering team faster, safer, and smarter.What You'll DoAs a member of our engineering team, you'll ship features that help first responders save lives, navigate emergencies, and keep their communities safe. You'll also help us explore new ways to deliver that impact more efficiently by thoughtfully integrating AI-assisted workflows into our development process.If you were on the team last week, you might have:Built or improved a workflow used by frontline police officers or dispatchers in our cloud-native platform Used tools like Cursor or GitHub Copilot to speed up implementation while maintaining high quality Partnered with teammates across engineering, product, and design to deliver a new feature end-to-end Experimented with using internal AI tools to automate a repetitive coding task or accelerate test coverage Fixed a bug affecting real users or improved the resilience of a high-uptime service Shared feedback in a retro or mentored a teammate through a tough technical decision What You'll NeedWe're looking for a thoughtful and driven software engineer with 1+ years of professional experience. You care about writing clean, maintainable code—and you're motivated by the idea that your work can help people in the moments they need it most. While you don't need deep AI expertise, we value a genuine interest in using AI tools to make development more effective.You should have:1+ years of professional software engineering experience or a Computer Science Degree and Internship Experience Experience with at least part of our stack: Java, Javascript, TypeScript + React, and MySQL (You will be asked to complete a coderpad test in Java and Javascript) Curiosity and comfort with modern development tools, including AI-assisted platforms like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or LLM APIs A collaborative mindset and strong communication skills A balance of pragmatism and technical rigor A desire to grow quickly on a high-impact, mission-oriented team People Who Thrive on Our Team Also Tend to Be:Mission-driven. You care about building technology that serves the public good and delivers real value to people who rely on it Humble, open, and curious. You ask questions before making assumptions, and you value others' perspectives Collaborative by default. You see teamwork as the key to strong engineering and impactful outcomes Growth-oriented. You embrace feedback, learn from setbacks, and aim to improve a little every day Comfortable with uncertainty. You're excited to help define best practices in a fast-evolving space LocationThis role is based in our Manchester, UK office and follows a hybrid work model. Team members are expected to be in the office at least three days per week to foster strong collaboration and a connected team environment.Our Privacy Notice describes how Mark43 uses and protects the personal information of prospective employees during the recruitment process. It informs you about our handling of the personal information you provide to us when you apply for a position in our organization and in general when you express your interest in joining our team.As a part of Mark43's security measures all employees must: Engage in appropriate use of the company's electronic information resources; Become knowledgeable about and follow relevant security policies and guidelines; Protect the resources under their control, such as passwords, computers, and data that they create, receive, or download; and Promptly report security-related incidents and violations, and responding to official reports of security incidents involving their systems or accounts.Mark43 is committed to the full inclusion of all qualified individuals. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex disability, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran status, or genetic information. As part of this commitment, we will ensure that persons with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodations. If reasonable accommodation is needed, please email recruiting@Mark43.com requesting the accommodation.
arr_raw: This role is based in our Manchester, UK office and follows a hybrid work model. Team members are expected to be in the office at least three days per week to foster strong collaboration and a connected team environment.
tech_raw: Java, Javascript, TypeScript + React, MySQL, AI-assisted development, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, internal AI tools, LLM APIs
label: maybe

title: Founding Engineer (£240k+ )
jd_text: What we’re building?The last major technological shift - the rise of the consumer internet - created LinkedIn as the networked winner in recruitment. The next great shift is here. AI is transforming how people and companies connect and it will redefine the global labor market.At Jack & Jill, we are building the company that leads this transformation.We’re 9 months old, have released two agentic products (Jack and Jill), have built a brilliant team of Europe’s best engineers, operators and ex founders, are run rating over £1m revenue and have raised $20M, led by tier-1 VC Creandum (Lovable, Spotify, Black Forest Labs, Bolt) Read more on TechCrunch.In the coming years, every knowledge worker will have an AI agent managing their career, and every company will have an AI agent helping them hire.By connecting those agents, we’re building a new infrastructure for the future of the labor market itself.If that vision excites you, come help us build it.Meet Jack & JillWe are not putting a thin AI layer on broken processes. We are rebuilding from first principles with two dedicated agents who work for their users:Jack, for candidates: An always-on career co-pilot. Jack starts with a deep conversation to understand who you are and what you really want. He provides market insights, coaching, and companionship.Jill, for companies: A true AI talent partner. Jill goes far beyond a job description to deeply understand your company, your culture, and the real context behind a role. She sources candidates, reviews inbound applicants, conducts first-pass screening calls, and acts as a strategic thought partner.Jack & Jill will not just disrupt the existing recruitment software market, but also the 10x bigger recruitment services market.We’re moving at breakneck speedWe’re 9 months old, and already built two remarkable products, have 100,000+ candidates using Jack, hundreds of paying customers signed up to Jill and built a spectacular early team. The technology is ready and 10x better than the status quo – we need to build and execute at a relentless speed to build on this early momentum and bring it to the world as fast as we can.We have thousands of users having an incredible experiences with Jack & Jill:Sharing their loveOn TikTokAnd everyone knows about itWho are we looking for?We’re looking for Founding Engineers to help us build Jack & Jill into the default way people find jobs!You’ll be a great fit if:🧠 You’re smartWe’re building at pace in an ambiguous, changing environment. We believe that general intelligence correlates highly with performance, particularly in such a context.🎯 You’re product-focusedYou want to make a real difference how millions of people spend most of their lives! We’re building at the bleeding edge of AI, but we’re not academics. Regardless of whether it’s by using the latest AI models or by simply talking to a customer; it’s the impact that matters to you, and you’re able to think about the customer, the product and the technology simultaneously.🏆 You’re an ambitious overachieverYou’ll have shown your ambition and excellence in your life. Whether that’s academically, professionally, in a sporting context, or in whatever else you’ve done. We want people that hold themselves to a high bar and are exceptional.🏃You want to move fastWe’re looking for people who want to move fast. We’re determined to become the default way people find jobs and we won’t get there by moving slowly. That means the hours may be long and we’ll have to make smart trade-offs, but we’ll change the world whilst doing it!📈 You’re high agencyWe’re looking for people to take ownership, who don’t need to be told what to do, but like being given hard, complex problems and finding creative solutions.🤝 You’re a good team playerWe need to be excellent individually, but a small team of exceptional people is so more than the sum of its parts. We’re going to be spending a lot of time together and we have no space on the team for brilliant jerks.(We’re working in-person at the Shoreditch Exchange and are hosting some other hackers and founders in our office so you’ll be surrounded by builders!)🏋🏻‍♀️ Our teamFounded by two experienced serial foundersMatt (CEO) - previous company grew to a $600m valuation in 3 years before exiting to DeelSaaras (CTO) went 0→ $3m ARR in a year as founder/CTO YC AI sales startup Kular.aiWe’re a 15-person, founder-heavy team (10 ex-founders)Check out our full team here💻 Our tech StackNext.js + TypescriptPython (FastAPI)PostgreSQL(But we’re stack agnostic – we believe the best engineers can pickup any tech stack…)🎁 And there’s also the perks….We’re building a high-performance environment. You’ll work hard, and we want to clear your plate to make sure that you have everything you need to be able to perform at your very best!💰 Total Compensation for this role of £240k+ (we let you choose your cash : equity split)🏥 Private health insurance with Bupa🚗 Uber home if you’re working late🍲 Deliveroo dinners in the office🧽 Fortnightly home clean💻 Brand new MacBook
arr_raw: (We’re working in-person at the Shoreditch Exchange and are hosting some other hackers and founders in our office so you’ll be surrounded by builders!)
comp_raw: Total Compensation for this role of £240k+ (we let you choose your cash : equity split)

title: Frontend Developer
jd_text: Contract Frontend Engineer (React / TypeScript) Initial 3-month contract, strong likelihood of extension Rate: up to £600 per day (inside IR35) Location: Leeds, 2 days per week on-site A large, well-established digital and media platform is looking for an experienced Frontend Engineer to support the delivery of customer-facing products used at scale. You will be joining a mature engineering environment with a strong focus on quality, collaboration, and modern engineering practices. Key responsibilitiesBuild and maintain high-performance web applications using React and TypeScriptWork closely with backend teams operating a microservices architectureWrite clean, well-tested code, following TDD principlesContribute to design decisions and technical discussions within the teamSupport deployments and ongoing improvements in a Kubernetes-based environmentRequired experienceStrong commercial experience with React and TypeScriptSolid understanding of microservices-based systemsProven experience working with TDD and automated testingFamiliarity with containerisation and KubernetesComfortable working in a collaborative, agile teamNice to haveExperience with PHP in a production environmentThis is a contract role offering immediate impact, modern technology, and a high chance of extension for the right engineer.

title: Javascript Fullstack Engineer - Senior
jd_text: With over 20 years of fully remote experience, Lumenalta offers:Fully remote workRapid growth opportunitiesSelf-ImprovementIndustry-leading clientsNurturing engineers’ career pathsWhat You Will Work OnCollaborate with visionary enterprise clientsCreate transformative digital productsLearn how to handle difficult situationsTackle complex challenges at scalePush boundaries with emerging technologiesRequirementsExpertise in React, Node, Express, Mongo, SQLWe have a 2-hour assessmentHigh-level English proficiency (written & verbal)Show up as a proactive, team-oriented self-starter on ZoomWhy Lumenalta?Work on meaningful, impactful projects.Collaborate with a talented, supportive teamEnjoy a flexible, remote-first environmentJoin a company that values your growthIf you’re a passionate, career-focused developer ready to make a lasting impact, we want to hear from you!What's it like to work at Lumenalta?This is a fully remote position open to candidates based in Europe or regions with compatible time zones. To ensure effective collaboration with our client and team, candidates must maintain a 6-hour overlap with Eastern U.S. business hours.Application DeadlineThis role is an evergreen position with no predetermined start date. Applications will be accepted until March 29, 2026. As we continue to build our talent pipeline, the position may be reposted to allow us to connect with additional qualified professionals.
